data.body:
## Description

Create tests/skills/test-shared-subworkflow-docs.sh verifying documentation accuracy:

- Test 1: CLAUDE.md references the shared scrutiny pipeline (shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md)
- Test 2: CLAUDE.md references the value/effort scorer (shared/prompts/value-effort-scorer.md)
- Test 3: CLAUDE.md references the scrutiny:pending gate behavior
- Test 4: No skill SKILL.md file references old brainstorm/docs/reviewers/ or roadmap/docs/reviewers/ paths (negative constraint — acceptable per exemption)
- Test 5: Shared reviewer prompts directory exists at the consolidated location

Add .test-index entry with RED marker.

## File Impact
- CREATE: tests/skills/test-shared-subworkflow-docs.sh
- MODIFY: .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] 5 test functions added
  Verify: grep -c '^test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-shared-subworkflow-docs.sh
- [ ] New tests FAIL (RED)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-shared-subworkflow-docs.sh 2>&1 | tail -3
